mission.title: Vision & Mission
mission.text: We transform building facades into digital communication surfaces — intelligent, sustainable, impactful.

appSection.title: Always in control.
appSection.text: Manage all your EDDAIR displays centrally via our app. Upload content, set schedules, measure performance — all in real time.

accessories.title: Find the perfect configuration.
accessories.text: From mounting kits to protective enclosures — discover the right accessories for your EDDAIR display solution.

experience.title: Experience eddy live.
experience.text: Visit one of our showrooms or book a personal demo.

sustainability.title: Digital Advertising. Sustainable.
sustainability.text1: No paper. No poster changes. No waste. EDDAIR display solutions replace traditional print advertising with digital content — controllable, measurable, resource-efficient.
sustainability.text2: Impact requires responsibility. And we are just getting started.

newsletter.title: STAY INFORMED
newsletter.text: News, updates and references: Be the first to know.
newsletter.privacy: EDDAIR will only use your data for the specified purposes.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.metaDescription: Contact EDDAIR – we will get back to you within 24 hours.
contactPage.text: Have questions about our display solutions? Write to us – we will get back to you within 24 hours.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.metaDescription: EDDAIR display solutions: eddy-wall-box, eddy-mobile, eddy-window, eddy-outdoor.

meta.title: EDDAIR – Digital Presence
meta.description: EDDAIR display solutions: eddy-wall-box, eddy-mobile, eddy-window, eddy-outdoor. Digital advertising surfaces for architecture and communication.
